title: Use non-blocking sleep functions in asynchronous code
description: Using blocking sleep functions in asynchronous code can prevent other tasks from being processed, leading to inefficient resource utilization.
message: Using blocking sleep functions in asynchronous tasks.
recommendation: Use non-blocking sleep functions in asynchronous tasks.

noncompliant.code:
import time
async def task():
    time.sleep(1)
    # ...
noncompliant.description: Using blocking sleep function in an async task.

compliant.code:
import asyncio
async def task():
    await asyncio.sleep(1)
    # ...
compliant.description: Using asyncio.sleep, a non-blocking sleep function, in an async task.

why_is_this_an_issue: Blocking sleep functions can prevent other tasks from being processed, leading to inefficient resource utilization.
how_to_fix: Use non-blocking sleep functions such as asyncio.sleep in asynchronous tasks.

metadata.title: Use non-blocking sleep functions in asynchronous code
